name: safesurf/safesurf
description: A PHP library for checking if a URL is safe to surf.

suggest.jeremykendall/php-domain-parser: Provides robust domain parsing for URL analysis.
suggest.io-developer/php-whois: Adds WHOIS lookup support for checking domain registration data.
suggest.phpfastcache/phpfastcache: Adds caching support to improve performance of repeated checks.
